title: Hiro's Animal School Day
synopsis: Hiro discovers different animals at his new school and learns what sounds they make while making friends in his classroom.

pages.text: Hiro walked into his new classroom. He saw something amazing! There were animal friends everywhere. A fluffy white rabbit sat by the reading corner. A colorful parrot perched near the window.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing showing a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face standing in a classroom doorway. White chalk outlines of a rabbit and parrot are visible, with simple math equations doodled in corners on the dark green board background.
illustration.alt: Hiro entering a classroom with animal friends

pages.text: The rabbit twitched its pink nose. 'Hello!' said Teacher. 'This is Snowy our class rabbit. Can you say hello to Snowy?' Hiro smiled big. He had never been so close to a real rabbit before.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing of a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face kneeling next to a white chalk-drawn rabbit. The teacher figure is sketched in white chalk in the background on the dark green board with dusty texture.
illustration.alt: Hiro meeting Snowy the rabbit with his teacher

pages.text: Snowy made soft sounds. The parrot squawked loudly. 'Animals make different sounds,' Teacher explained. 'Let's learn them together!' Hiro clapped his hands with excitement.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing showing a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face clapping his hands. White and colored chalk drawings of a rabbit and parrot with sound waves around them, simple addition problems doodled on the dark green board background.
illustration.alt: Hiro learning about animal sounds in class

pages.text: Soon more children came to meet the animals. Everyone took turns petting Snowy gently. The parrot said 'Hello' back to them. Hiro made new friends who loved animals too. School was going to be wonderful!

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing of several children including a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face gathered around chalk-drawn animals. White chalk outlines show kids petting a rabbit while a parrot watches, scattered alphabet letters and numbers on the artistic warm dark green board.
illustration.alt: Hiro and his new classmates with the class animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: chalkboard style, chalk drawings, dark green board, white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

questions.question: What was the name of the class rabbit?
questions.explanation: The teacher told Hiro that the white rabbit's name was Snowy.

questions.question: Where was the parrot in the classroom?
questions.explanation: The colorful parrot was perched near the window when Hiro first saw it.

questions.question: How did Hiro feel about school at the end?
questions.explanation: Hiro thought school was going to be wonderful after meeting the animals and making friends.

questions.question: What did the children do with Snowy?
questions.explanation: The story says everyone took turns petting Snowy gently.
